BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: SELTZER CAPLAN MCMAHON VITEK A LAW CORPORATIO

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: FUNDING THEIR PROGRAMS AND SERVICES TO SUPPORT THOSE AFFECTED BY AND AT RISK OF CHILD ABUSE AND NEGLECT.
BRINGS TOGETHER AND COORDINATES THE EFFORTS OF CHARITIES, COMPANIES AND INDIVIDUALS WHO ACTIVELY WORK TO IMPROVE THE LIVES OF CHILDREN.

CASE FOR KINDNESS DOCUMENTARY, INITIATIVE TO END CHILDHOOD DROWNING, SECOND CHANCE HIRING, UNITED FOR FINANCIAL HEALTH, SKILLED TRADES, INHERIT THE MUSIC AND WOMEN IN MUSIC, IMPACT PHILANTHROPY, ACES INITIATIVE.

AppliedToPriorYearElection.ElectionDesc: THE FOUNDATION IS MAKING THE ELECTION UNDER REGULATIONS SECTION 53.4942(A)-3(D)(2) TO APPLY ALL OR PART OF THE REMAINING QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTIONS TO ANY UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME REMAINING FROM YEARS BEFORE 2020.

DepreciationPropertyGrp.PropertyDesc: INV#02009-24-01/SIDING, WINDOWS, GLASS DOORS AND TRIM REPLACEMENT - 17

GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: THE 2023 FORM 990PF RETURN IS BEING AMENDED TO REPORT ADDITIONAL RENTAL EXPENSES IN THE AMOUNT OF $587,734. THE ADDITIONAL EXPENSES WERE INCORRECTLY REPORTED AS IMPOUNDS HELD BY BANKS AND INCLUDED IN THE BALANCE SHEET. THE AMENDED RETURN IS ALSO CORRECTING TOTAL ENDING ASSETS AND FUND BALANCE RELATING TO THE ADDITIONAL RENTAL EXPENSES. TOTAL BOOK INCOME HAS DECREASED BY $587,374.TOTAL NET INVESTMENT INCOME HAS DECREASED BY $532,924UNRELATED BUSINESS INCOME REPORTED ON THE 990T HAS DECREASED BY $54,451. SPECIFIC ADJUSTMENTS ARE AS FOLLOWS:FORM 990PF, PART I, LINE 26, COLUMN A:TOTAL EXPENSES - ORIGINALLY FILED - $27,311,735 TOTAL EXPENSES - AMENDED - $27,899,109AMENDED RETURN CHANGE IN TOTAL EXPENSES - <$587,374>FORM 990PF, PART I, LINE 27, COLUMN A:TOTAL NET BOOK INCOME - ORIGINALLY FILED - <$6,515,694> TOTAL NET BOOK INCOME - AMENDED - <$7,103,068>AMENDED RETURN CHANGE IN TOTAL NET BOOK INCOME - <$587,374>FORM 990PF, PART I, LINE 27, COLUMN B:TOTAL NET INVESTMENT INCOME - ORIGINALLY FILED - $1,332,750 TOTAL NET INVESTMENT INCOME - AMENDED - $799,826AMENDED RETURN DECREASE IN TOTAL NET INVESTMENT INCOME - <$532,924>FORM 990PF, PART V, LINE 5:TOTAL TAX BASED ON INVESTMENT INCOME - ORIGINALLY FILED - $18,525 TOTAL TAX BASED ON INVESTMENT INCOME - AMENDED - $11,118AMENDED RETURN DECREASE IN TAX BASED ON INVESTMENT INCOME - <$7,407>FORM 990PF, PART II, LINE 16, COLUMN B:TOTAL ASSETS BOOK VALUE - ORIGINALLY FILED - $170,108,444 TOTAL ASSETS BOOK VALUE - AMENDED - $169,521,070AMENDED RETURN DECREASE IN TOTAL ASSETS BOOK VALUE - <$587,374>FORM 990PF, BALANCE SHEET:TOTAL FUND BALANCE - ORIGINALLY FILED - $63,724,742TOTAL FUND BALANCE - AMENDED - $63,137,368AMENDED RETURN DECREASE IN TOTAL FUND BALANCE - <$587,374>
